name: Salmon DNA Sodium Essence (High-End Edition)
nameZh: 三文鱼DNA钠精华液高定版
description: Deeply moisturizes, controls oil, shrinks pores, brightens skin tone, and nourishes the skin. Specifically formulated with PDRN for premium anti-aging care.
descriptionZh: 保湿，控油，收缩毛孔，补水保湿，提亮肤色，滋润，柔润肌肤。特别添加PDRN成分，提供卓越的抗初老与修护功效。
productDetail: A premium facial essence developed for brands and professional skincare programs seeking a refined PDRN-focused repair concept. The lightweight texture is designed for daily layering and supports a hydrated, smooth and luminous appearance. Suitable for private-label customization of packaging, concentration positioning and gift-set combinations. For cosmetic use only; final claims and directions should follow the approved formula and local regulations.
productDetailZh: 面向高端护肤品牌及专业护理方案开发的PDRN概念修护精华。轻盈质地适合日常叠加使用，帮助肌肤呈现水润、细腻与透亮观感。支持瓶器、配方浓度定位及礼盒组合等贴牌定制。仅供化妆品用途，最终功效宣称及使用方法应以确认配方和当地法规为准。

specs.label: Target concerns
specs.value: Dryness, dullness and loss of firmness

valueI18n.en: Dryness, dullness and loss of firmness
valueI18n.zh: 干燥、暗沉及缺乏紧致感
配方定位、瓶器及包装定制

name: Salmon PDRN Regular Essence
description: Basic anti-aging and deep skin repair. Improves elasticity and restores youthful radiance to the skin.
descriptionZh: 基础抗初老，深度修护肌底，提升肌肤弹力与光泽，重塑年轻健康肌。
productDetail: A versatile daily essence positioned for accessible PDRN-inspired skincare lines. Its fresh, easy-to-layer format makes it suitable for routine hydration and early anti-aging product ranges. The product can be adapted for retail bottles, trial kits and multi-step skincare sets, with label and outer-box customization available for private-label projects. For cosmetic use only.
productDetailZh: 适合大众化PDRN概念护肤线的日常精华，清爽易叠加，可用于补水及初抗老产品组合。可根据贴牌项目需求定制零售瓶、试用装、多步骤护肤套装，以及标签和外盒设计。仅供化妆品用途。

specs.label: Target concerns
specs.value: Dehydration, dullness and early signs of aging

valueI18n.en: Dehydration, dullness and early signs of aging

specs.label: Customization
specs.value: Bottle, label, carton and set options

valueI18n.en: Bottle, label, carton and set options
valueI18n.zh: 瓶器、标签、彩盒及套装定制

name: Exosome Freeze-Dried Powder
description: Advanced exosome technology provides intensive repair for aging and damaged cells, effectively restoring youthfulness.
descriptionZh: 顶尖外泌体技术，密集修护老化受损细胞，促进胶原蛋白再生，重塑年轻肌龄。
productDetail: A professional freeze-dried skincare format built around an exosome-inspired cosmetic concept. The dry format is intended to support formula freshness before activation and is suitable for premium home-care kits or professional beauty-channel programs. Packaging, vial count and companion activating solution can be customized for private-label projects. Cosmetic product positioning only; it is not intended to diagnose, treat or prevent disease.
productDetailZh: 采用外泌体概念的专业冻干护肤形态，干态设计有助于在启用前保持配方状态，适合高端居家护理套装或专业美容渠道项目。支持瓶数、冻干瓶包装及配套溶媒的贴牌定制。仅作化妆品定位，不用于诊断、治疗或预防疾病。

name: Elijaheli Collagen Hydrating Mask
description: Intensively hydrates, shrinks pores, and brightens the complexion. Leaves the skin smooth, nourished, and glowing.
descriptionZh: 收缩毛孔，补水保湿，提亮肤色，滋润，柔润肌肤。富含胶原蛋白成分，让肌肤焕发水润光泽。
productDetail: A collagen-themed sheet mask designed for convenient daily hydration and a soft, dewy skin appearance. The essence-rich format fits retail, promotional and skincare-set applications. Private-label options may include sheet material, essence positioning, pouch artwork, box quantity and gift packaging. Recommended directions: apply to clean skin, leave on for the time stated on the final approved packaging, then remove and gently pat in the remaining essence.
productDetailZh: 以胶原蛋白概念打造的贴片面膜，适合日常便捷补水，帮助肌肤呈现柔润水光感。精华液充足，适用于零售、促销赠品及护肤套装。可定制膜布材质、精华定位、袋装设计、盒装片数和礼盒包装。建议洁面后使用，按照最终审核包装标注的时间敷贴，取下后轻拍剩余精华至吸收。

valueI18n.zh: 胶原蛋白概念保湿护理
